hero.art_prompt: Sneha, a 27 year old Indian woman in smart-casual, confidently reviewing a clear, transparent MBA fee breakdown on a laptop, reassured and hopeful, tidy modern home office.

panels.narration: Sneha searched everywhere for the real JAIN MBA fee.
panels.img_prompt: Sneha, 27, at a laptop searching for clear fee information, curious and focused, tidy home office.

panels.narration: Other sites showed vague numbers and hidden extras.
panels.dialogue: Just tell me the full fee.
panels.img_prompt: Sneha looking a little frustrated at a laptop showing unclear, incomplete fee information, modern room.

panels.narration: Then she found the full JAIN MBA fee, laid out clearly.
panels.img_prompt: Sneha's face relaxing with relief at a laptop showing a clean, clear MBA fee breakdown, warm reassured glow.

panels.narration: She enrolled with total clarity on the cost.
panels.img_prompt: Sneha smiling confidently at her laptop after enrolling, calm and assured, warm hopeful light.

turn.title: The JAIN Online MBA Fee, In Full
points: ₹2,00,000 for the full 2-year MBA (₹50,000/semester). That is the complete tuition, no hidden charges.
₹2,500 one-time registration. That is it for the essentials.
Pay upfront for a discount, or choose 0% interest EMI from about ₹8,333/month.
A UGC-entitled, NAAC A++ MBA from JAIN (Deemed-to-be-University).

testimonials.name: Sneha Pillai
testimonials.quote: I just wanted the real number. JAIN showed the full MBA fee clearly, with no hidden extras.

testimonials.name: Karan Mehta
testimonials.quote: The monthly EMI made a JAIN MBA easy to plan. I knew my exact cost from day one.

testimonials.name: Ritu Sharma
testimonials.quote: A recognised JAIN MBA at a transparent fee. That trust is why I chose it over cheaper unknowns.

testimonials.name: Manoj K
testimonials.quote: No hidden charges appeared, ever. The fee I saw at the start was exactly what I paid.

facts.v: 0% interest EMI from about ₹8,333/month, or an education loan
